articles.title: The enterprise risk nobody is modeling: AI is replacing the very experts it needs to learn from
articles.description: The industry has a plan for building smarter models. It doesn't have a plan for the evaluators those models depend on.
articles.content: For AI systems to keep improving in knowledge work, they need either a reliable mechanism for autonomous self-improvement or human evaluators capable of catching errors and generating high-quality feedback. The industry has invested enormously in the... [6616 chars]

articles.title: Seth Rogen Says If You Use AI to Write, Then You Shouldn't Be a Writer
articles.description: Seth Rogen says if you use Ai to write your stories or scripts, then 'you shouldn't be a writer.'
articles.content:
